revision.text:
'''癸酉'''（みずのととり、きゆう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて10番目で、前は[[壬申]]、次は[[甲戌]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は水、[[十二支]]の五行は金で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（金生水）である。
==癸酉の年==
==癸酉の日== ===[[選日]]=== 癸酉の日は[[犯土|大土]]の4日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings
revision.text: #redirect[[en:癸酉]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''癸酉'''（みずのととり、きすいのとり、きゆう）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの10番目で、前は[[壬申]]、次は[[甲戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。
==癸酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って13が余る年が癸酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[13年]] *[[73年]] *[[133年]] *[[193年]] *[[253年]] *[[313年]] *[[373年]] *[[433年]] *[[493年]] *[[553年]] *[[613年]] *[[673年]] *[[733年]] *[[793年]] *[[853年]] *[[913年]] *[[973年]] | *[[1033年]] *[[1093年]] *[[1153年]] *[[1213年]] *[[1273年]] *[[1333年]] *[[1393年]] *[[1453年]] *[[1513年]] *[[1573年]] *[[1633年]] *[[1693年]] *[[1753年]] *[[1813年]] *[[1873年]] *[[1933年]] *[[1993年]] | *[[2053年]] *[[2113年]] *[[2173年]] *[[2233年]] *[[2293年]] *[[2353年]] *[[2413年]] *[[2473年]] *[[2533年]] *[[2593年]] *[[2653年]] *[[2713年]] *[[2773年]] *[[2833年]] *[[2893年]] *[[2953年]] |}
==癸酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[8月]]が癸酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸酉の日== 癸酉の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 癸酉の日は[[犯土|大土]]の4日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:癸酉]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:癸酉]]

==癸酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って13が余る年が癸酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[13年]] *[[73年]] *[[133年]] *[[193年]] *[[253年]] *[[313年]] *[[373年]] *[[433年]] *[[493年]] *[[553年]] *[[613年]] *[[673年]] *[[733年]] *[[793年]] *[[853年]] *[[913年]] *[[973年]] | *[[1033年]] *[[1093年]] *[[1153年]] *[[1213年]] *[[1273年]] *[[1333年]] *[[1393年]] *[[1453年]] *[[1513年]] *[[1573年]] *[[1633年]] *[[1693年]] *[[1753年]] *[[1813年]] *[[1873年]] *[[1933年]] *[[1993年]] | *[[2053年]] *[[2113年]] *[[2173年]] *[[2233年]] *[[2293年]] *[[2353年]] *[[2413年]] *[[2473年]] *[[2533年]] *[[2593年]] *[[2653年]] *[[2713年]] *[[2773年]] *[[2833年]] *[[2893年]] *[[2953年]] |}
==癸酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[8月]]が癸酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸酉の日== 癸酉の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 癸酉の日は[[犯土|大土]]の4日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:癸酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:癸酉]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''癸酉'''（みずのととり、きすいのとり、きゆう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの10番目で、前は[[壬申]]、次は[[甲戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。
==癸酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って13が余る年が癸酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[13年]] *[[73年]] *[[133年]] *[[193年]] *[[253年]] *[[313年]] *[[373年]] *[[433年]] *[[493年]] *[[553年]] *[[613年]] *[[673年]] *[[733年]] *[[793年]] *[[853年]] *[[913年]] *[[973年]] | *[[1033年]] *[[1093年]] *[[1153年]] *[[1213年]] *[[1273年]] *[[1333年]] *[[1393年]] *[[1453年]] *[[1513年]] *[[1573年]] *[[1633年]] *[[1693年]] *[[1753年]] *[[1813年]] *[[1873年]] *[[1933年]] *[[1993年]] | *[[2053年]] *[[2113年]] *[[2173年]] *[[2233年]] *[[2293年]] *[[2353年]] *[[2413年]] *[[2473年]] *[[2533年]] *[[2593年]] *[[2653年]] *[[2713年]] *[[2773年]] *[[2833年]] *[[2893年]] *[[2953年]] |}
==癸酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[8月]]が癸酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸酉の日== 癸酉の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 癸酉の日は[[犯土|大土]]の4日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rooster-qq]] [[Category:癸酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸酉]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rooster-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:Subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Water Rooster}][[Category:qq]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:癸酉]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yin Water Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yin Water Rooster]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''癸酉'''（みずのととり、きすいのとり、きゆう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの10番目で、前は[[壬申]]、次は[[甲戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rooster|kanji=癸酉|romaji=mizunoto tori|onyomi=kiyū|p=guǐyǒu|w=kuei-yu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 jau5|j=gwai2 jau5|ci=kʷɐi jɐu²|mc=kjwɨj jɨuX|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢʷɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Rooster also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸酉'''（みずのととり、きすいのとり、きゆう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの10番目で、前は[[壬申]]、次は[[甲戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。
==癸酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って13が余る年が癸酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[13年]] *[[73年]] *[[133年]] *[[193年]] *[[253年]] *[[313年]] *[[373年]] *[[433年]] *[[493年]] *[[553年]] *[[613年]] *[[673年]] *[[733年]] *[[793年]] *[[853年]] *[[913年]] *[[973年]] | *[[1033年]] *[[1093年]] *[[1153年]] *[[1213年]] *[[1273年]] *[[1333年]] *[[1393年]] *[[1453年]] *[[1513年]] *[[1573年]] *[[1633年]] *[[1693年]] *[[1753年]] *[[1813年]] *[[1873年]] *[[1933年]] *[[1993年]] | *[[2053年]] *[[2113年]] *[[2173年]] *[[2233年]] *[[2293年]] *[[2353年]] *[[2413年]] *[[2473年]] *[[2533年]] *[[2593年]] *[[2653年]] *[[2713年]] *[[2773年]] *[[2833年]] *[[2893年]] *[[2953年]] |}
==癸酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[8月]]が癸酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸酉の日== 癸酉の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 癸酉の日は[[犯土|大土]]の4日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rooster-qq]] [[Category:癸酉]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:癸酉]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:癸酉]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Rooster-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:Sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Water Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]] [[ja:癸酉]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[fr:Coq de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[ja:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[fr:Coq de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[fr:Coq de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:sqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqqq]][[ja:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[fr:Coq de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[Category:qq]][[ja:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[fr:Coq de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[fr:Coq de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[fr:Coq de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:trimming off this bad category]][[ja:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[fr:Coq de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[Category:trimming off this bad category]] [[Category:qq]][[ja:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[fr:Coq de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Yin Water Rooster]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:Yin Water Rooster]] [[ja:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[fr:Coq de eau]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]] [[sn:Yin Water Rooster]]

==癸酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って13が余る年が癸酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[13年]] *[[73年]] *[[133年]] *[[193年]] *[[253年]] *[[313年]] *[[373年]] *[[433年]] *[[493年]] *[[553年]] *[[613年]] *[[673年]] *[[733年]] *[[793年]] *[[853年]] *[[913年]] *[[973年]] | *[[1033年]] *[[1093年]] *[[1153年]] *[[1213年]] *[[1273年]] *[[1333年]] *[[1393年]] *[[1453年]] *[[1513年]] *[[1573年]] *[[1633年]] *[[1693年]] *[[1753年]] *[[1813年]] *[[1873年]] *[[1933年]] *[[1993年]] | *[[2053年]] *[[2113年]] *[[2173年]] *[[2233年]] *[[2293年]] *[[2353年]] *[[2413年]] *[[2473年]] *[[2533年]] *[[2593年]] *[[2653年]] *[[2713年]] *[[2773年]] *[[2833年]] *[[2893年]] *[[2953年]] |}
==癸酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[8月]]が癸酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rooster|kanji=癸酉|romaji=mizunoto tori|onyomi=kiyū|p=guǐyǒu|w=kuei-yu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 jau5|j=gwai2 jau5|ci=kʷɐi jɐu²|mc=kjwɨj jɨuX|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢʷɯʔ}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yin Water Rooster also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 癸酉'''（みずのととり、きすいのとり、きゆう）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの10番目で、前は[[壬申]]、次は[[甲戌]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[酉]]は陰の[[金]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。
==癸酉の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って13が余る年が癸酉の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸酉の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[13年]] *[[73年]] *[[133年]] *[[193年]] *[[253年]] *[[313年]] *[[373年]] *[[433年]] *[[493年]] *[[553年]] *[[613年]] *[[673年]] *[[733年]] *[[793年]] *[[853年]] *[[913年]] *[[973年]] | *[[1033年]] *[[1093年]] *[[1153年]] *[[1213年]] *[[1273年]] *[[1333年]] *[[1393年]] *[[1453年]] *[[1513年]] *[[1573年]] *[[1633年]] *[[1693年]] *[[1753年]] *[[1813年]] *[[1873年]] *[[1933年]] *[[1993年]] | *[[2053年]] *[[2113年]] *[[2173年]] *[[2233年]] *[[2293年]] *[[2353年]] *[[2413年]] *[[2473年]] *[[2533年]] *[[2593年]] *[[2653年]] *[[2713年]] *[[2773年]] *[[2833年]] *[[2893年]] *[[2953年]] |}
==癸酉の月== 西暦年の下1桁が4・9（十干が[[甲]]・[[己]]）の年の[[8月]]が癸酉の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[白露]]から[[寒露]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸酉の日== 癸酉の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 癸酉の日は[[犯土|大土]]の4日目である。

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q655662]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rooster|kanji=癸酉|romaji=mizunoto tori|onyomi=kiyū|p=guǐyǒu|w=kuei-yu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 jau5|j=gwai2 jau5|ci=kʷɐi jɐu²|mc=kjwɨj jɨuX|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢʷɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto ==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiyuu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Water Rooster (癸酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのととり (mizu-no-to-tori) ***Onyomi: きすいのとり (kisui-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 13 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Water Rooster (癸酉)'s years table''' |- ! Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q655662]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rooster|kanji=癸酉|romaji=mizunoto tori|onyomi=kiyū|p=guǐyǒu|w=kuei-yu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 jau5|j=gwai2 jau5|ci=kʷɐi jɐu²|mc=kjwɨj jɨuX|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢʷɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal generates Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiyuu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

--> ==Years of Yin Water Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 13 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Water Rooster (癸酉)'s years table''' |- ! However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|qq=|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q655662]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rooster|kanji=癸酉|romaji=mizunoto tori|onyomi=kiyū|p=guǐyǒu|w=kuei-yu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 jau5|j=gwai2 jau5|ci=kʷɐi jɐu²|mc=kjwɨj jɨuX|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢʷɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal generates Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiyuu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-iū]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[fr:Coq d'eau]][[hak:Kui-yû]][[ja:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[nds:Water-Hahn]][[vi:Quý Dậu]][[za:Gveiqyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-iú]][[zh-yue:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q655662]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rooster|kanji=癸酉|romaji=mizunoto tori|onyomi=kiyū|p=guǐyǒu|w=kuei-yu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 jau5|j=gwai2 jau5|ci=kʷɐi jɐu²|mc=kjwɨj jɨuX|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢʷɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal generates Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiyuu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-iū]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[fr:Coq d'eau]][[hak:Kui-yû]][[ja:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[nds:Water-Hahn]][[vi:Quý Dậu]][[za:Gveiqyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-iú]][[zh-yue:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q655662]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rooster|kanji=癸酉|romaji=mizunoto tori|onyomi=kiyū|p=guǐyǒu|w=kuei-yu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 jau5|j=gwai2 jau5|ci=kʷɐi jɐu²|mc=kjwɨj jɨuX|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢʷɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal generates Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiyuu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

[[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements AD|ja|2953年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2953|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2953 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Water Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterhaan (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-iū]][[de:Wasser-Hahn]][[fr:Coq d'eau]][[hak:Kui-yû]][[ja:癸酉]][[ko:계유]][[nds:Water-Hahn]][[vi:Quý Dậu]][[za:Gveiqyoux]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-iú]][[zh-yue:癸酉]][[zh:癸酉]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q655662]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Rooster [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rooster|kanji=癸酉|romaji=mizunoto tori|onyomi=kiyū|p=guǐyǒu|w=kuei-yu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 jau5|j=gwai2 jau5|ci=kʷɐi jɐu²|mc=kjwɨj jɨuX|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢʷɯʔ|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ hành)|10=pt|11=Água (astrologia)|lt=Water (水)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig (wuxing)|8=vi|9=Thủy (Ngũ (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal generates Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiyuu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig generates Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiyuu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu
<!-- == * Yin Water Rooster (癸酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのととり (mizu-no-to-tori) ***Onyomi: きすいのとり (kisui-no-tori) ***Onyomi: きゆう (kiyū) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): giyu ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu
--> ==Years of Yin Water Rooster== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 13 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|year]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Yin Water Rooster (癸酉)'s years table''' |- ! AD|ja|2953年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2953|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2953 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Water Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

[[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water AD|ja|2953年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2953|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2953 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Water Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
