It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig generates Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiyuu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

AD|ja|2953年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2953|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2953 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Water Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

[[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig generates Water).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori ***Onyomi 1: kiyuu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|6=bcl|7=Tubig AD|ja|2953年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2953|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2953 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |} ==Months of Yin Water Rooster== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:August|August]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|month (calendar)]] of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Bailu (solar term)|White Dew]] until the day before [[:en:Hanlu|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yin Water Rooster== The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows. === 選日 === The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiyuu

** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

==Months of Yin Water Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this ==Months of Yin Water Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiyuu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

==Months of Yin Water Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rooster|kanji=癸酉|romaji=mizunoto tori|onyomi=kiyū|p=guǐyǒu|w=kuei-yu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 jau5|j=gwai2 jau5|ci=kʷɐi jɐu²|mc=kjwɨj jɨuX|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢʷɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiyuu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

==Months of Yin Water Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Rooster (癸酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiyuu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

==Months of Yin Water Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)}} of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Rooster|kanji=癸酉|romaji=mizunoto tori|onyomi=kiyū|p=guǐyǒu|w=kuei-yu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=gwai2 jau5|j=gwai2 jau5|ci=kʷɐi jɐu²|mc=kjwɨj jɨuX|oc-bs=kʷeʔ ɢʷɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

==Months of Yin Water Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August|1=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Hanlu}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this ==Months of Yin Water Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August|1=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Hanlu}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

'''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr **  Japanese:

***Onyomi 1: kiyuu

** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

==Months of Yin Water Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August|1=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Hanlu}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Rooster also known as 癸酉''' (mizu no totori, kisui no tori, kiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 10th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Jinshin|ja|1=Yang Water Monkey|2=ja|壬申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jinshin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushoku|ja|1=Yang Wood Dog|2=ja|甲戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|2=uk|3=Вода (У-сін)|4=als|5=Wasser in dr ==Pronunciation==

** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: kiyuu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gye-yu (계유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Dậu

==Months of Yin Water Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 4 or 9 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|WD=Q122|lt=August|1=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|WD=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Hanlu}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yin Water Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Kiyuu|ja|癸酉|1=Yin Water Rooster|2=ja|3=癸酉|4=zh|5-癸酉|6=ko|7=계유|lt_ko=계유|8=fr|9=Coq de eau|10=de|11=Wasser-Hahn|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Rooster|qq=}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Large Earth|ja|犯土|lt=Large Earth|lt_ja=大土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Large Earth|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11571306}}.
